issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive/constant effect), not 'OnAttacked'. The text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates a passive condition, not a response to being attacked.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. The card text '[Opponent's Turn]' specifies the effect lasts during opponent's turn phase, not until end of turn.
Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' with name 'Shirahoshi', not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The text references 'your Leader', not a character on board.
